instruction: The gray watermark square on the battery charging icon got recolored near-white. Restore its original color.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/battery-charging.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 18H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3.19M15 6h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v8a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3.19"/><line x1="23" y1="13" x2="23" y2="11"/><polyline points="11 6 7 12 13 12 9 18"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#fcfcfc" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/battery-charging.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 18H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3.19M15 6h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v8a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3.19"/><line x1="23" y1="13" x2="23" y2="11"/><polyline points="11 6 7 12 13 12 9 18"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#9ca3af" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
